Match genesets to expression genes

Source: R/geneset_utils.R
match_geneset.Rd

Match genesets to expression genes

Usage

match_geneset(gs, expr_genes, verbose = TRUE)

Arguments

gs

Named list genesets.

expr_genes

Character vector of expression rownames.

verbose

Print overlap summary.

Value

List with matched genesets and overlap info.
